name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America in Hialeah, FL at 2750 W 68th St offers payday and title loans with convenient hours.
description_long:
Located at 2750 W 68th St #110 in Hialeah, FL, this Advance America is a standalone payday and title loan office. Operating hours are Monday through Thursday 10 AM to 6 PM, Friday 9 AM to 6 PM, and Saturday 9 AM to 4 PM, with Sundays closed. The Hialeah branch serves local residents seeking quick access to loans in this established commercial area.

At this Hialeah location, Advance America provides payday loans, title loans, and related financial services for immediate cash needs. Call 305-231-7973 during business hours to apply, get a quote, or speak with the staff. The office handles walk-in customers and can typically approve qualified applications the same day.

Bring your government-issued ID, proof of income, and banking information when you visit this location. The staff can process applications quickly, with qualified customers often approved within hours. Hialeah residents needing emergency cash will find a straightforward lending option here on W 68th St.

pricing.guarantee_details: Worry-Free Advance policy waives outstanding loan fees if the borrower loses their job during the loan term. No standard refund on loan fees paid.

tiers.name: Payday Loan
features: Due on borrower's next payday (typically 2–4 weeks)
In-store cash disbursement in approximately 30 minutes
Online applications with next-business-day ACH funding

tiers.name: Installment Loan
features: APR up to 200%+ depending on state

tiers.name: Title Loan
features: APR as low as 36% on larger loan amounts

tiers.name: Line of Credit
features: Draw funds as needed up to credit limit

pros: 1,500+ store locations across ~28 states — one of the most physically accessible short-term lenders in the U.S.
Founded in 1997 with nearly 30 years of continuous operation in consumer short-term lending
Worry-Free Advance policy waives outstanding loan fees if borrower loses their job during loan term
A+ BBB rating maintained across decades of high-volume lending activity
Same-day in-store cash disbursement typically within 30 minutes of approval
Founding member of CFSA, operating under the industry's principal self-regulatory standards
Full online application and account management portal available without a branch visit
cons: Payday loan APRs range from 350%–664% — among the highest-cost credit products legally available to U.S. consumers
February 2023 data breach affecting customer personal data led to a $7.75 million class action settlement
Product availability is inconsistent across states — payday loans, title loans, and lines of credit are not uniformly offered
No standard money-back guarantee on loan fees; Worry-Free Advance is limited strictly to job loss scenarios
Rollover and renewal options, where state law permits, can lead borrowers into cycles of escalating debt
best_for: Consumers needing $100–$2,000 in emergency cash within hours who cannot qualify for bank or credit union loans
Individuals with poor or no credit history facing urgent bills such as car repairs, utilities, or medical expenses
Borrowers who prefer in-person service and same-day cash pickup at a physical branch location
People who have exhausted lower-cost alternatives and need a large, state-licensed lender with regulated terms
diagnosis: Advance America is genuinely best suited for credit-challenged consumers facing a short-term cash emergency with no bank or credit union alternative — its 1,500+ locations and rapid approval process are real and meaningful strengths in that context. The primary caveat is cost: payday loan APRs exceeding 400% make this one of the most expensive borrowing options available, and the 2023 data breach settlement is a material concern for privacy-conscious consumers. Anyone who qualifies for a credit union PAL, employer advance, or personal loan should exhaust those options before applying here.
services: Title Loans (up to ~$25,000, secured by vehicle title)
Online account management and repayment portal (online.advanceamerica.net)
Next-business-day ACH funding for online loans
Worry-Free Advance job-loss fee waiver program

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.

meta_description: Advance America at 2750 W 68th St, Hialeah, FL. Fast payday and title loans.
